overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character riding a horse through a Western desert landscape at night. The journey begins in a small adobe settlement with warm lantern light, transitions through open desert terrain with large rock formations, follows a coastal cliffside path under bright moonlight, and enters a narrow canyon passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert outpost with adobe buildings and lantern light

events.description: beginning in a desert settlement with adobe architecture and warm lighting
exiting the settlement walls into open desert terrain

agents.ego_description: riding a black horse through a desert outpost, passing adobe buildings with lit windows and wooden porches

entered.detail: single-story adobe structure with warm yellow light glowing from windows
curved adobe boundary wall with wooden fence posts
wooden porch structure attached to the adobe building
large red rock outcropping visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a small desert outpost at night, with the camera following a horse rider past adobe buildings illuminated by warm lantern light. The rider moves along a dirt path between a curved adobe wall on the right and wooden porches on the left, gradually transitioning from the built environment toward open desert.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert plateau with large rock buttes

events.description: leaving the settlement completely for open desert plateau
horse turns left toward the coastline, changing direction from straight to curved path

agents.ego_description: galloping the horse across open desert terrain toward large rock buttes on the horizon

entered.detail: tall isolated rock formation rising prominently against the night sky
sparse low-lying desert vegetation and bushes
wooden wagon cart left beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The rider gallops across an open desert plateau under bright moonlight, leaving the settlement behind. A large rock butte dominates the horizon ahead, while sparse desert scrub lines the trail. The horse turns left toward a distant cliff edge, passing an abandoned wooden cart beside the path.

events.description: reaching the coastal cliff edge with ocean visible below
waves crashing against rocks become visible and audible below the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: riding along a narrow cliffside trail with the ocean visible to the left under bright moonlight

entered.detail: dark ocean water stretching to the horizon under moonlight
steep cliff drop-off descending to the ocean below
red rock formations lining the inland side of the coastal path

segments.scene_description: The trail follows a dramatic coastal cliffside, with the ocean visible far below to the left and red rock formations rising on the right. The moon illuminates the water's surface while waves crash against the rocks at the base of the cliff. The vegetation becomes slightly denser with coastal shrubs.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow winding canyon passage between steep rock walls

events.description: entering narrow canyon between high red rock walls
rock overhang temporarily obscures the moon and narrows the visible sky

agents.ego_description: navigating the horse through a narrow canyon passage with steep rock walls closing in on both sides

entered.detail: steep red rock wall rising immediately to the left of the path
steep red rock wall rising immediately to the right of the path
rock formation extending over the path creating partial cover

segments.scene_description: The path enters a narrow canyon passage with steep red rock walls rising on both sides, creating a sheltered, shadowed environment. The sky becomes partially obscured by the canyon walls and rock overhangs as the trail winds deeper into the rock formation, leaving the open coastal views behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a warm, sheltered desert outpost into the vast, moonlit wilderness and finally into a secluded canyon. It begins by following a horse rider past adobe buildings illuminated by glowing lanterns, moving along a dirt path that gradually leads away from the settlement. As the rider gallops onto an open plateau, the warm light fades into bright moonlight, passing an abandoned wooden cart as the horizon opens up toward a massive rock butte. The scene then shifts to a dramatic coastal cliffside where the trail winds between red rock formations and a shimmering ocean below, before turning away from the coast and entering a narrow canyon. Finally, the environment closes in as steep red walls rise on both sides, obscuring the sky and plunging the rider into a shadowed, sheltered passage.
